title: Add Pollinations Image lab to image
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds [Pollinations Image lab](https://raptorvampire.github.io/pollinations-image-lab/) to image
- Generate and browse images using Pollinations Image Lab.

Fixes #12158

gist.headline: Welcome to the Image Lab
gist.blurb: Another day, another community app sprouting in the Greenhouse. The Pollinations Image Lab just dropped into the directory, giving you a clean new way to generate and browse pixels.
gist.summary: Added the community-built Pollinations Image Lab by raptorvampire to the Greenhouse apps directory.
gist.impact: Users can now discover and launch the Pollinations Image Lab directly from our ecosystem to generate and browse images.
gist.visual_concept: The bee mascot in a cozy laboratory or art studio setting, looking at a glowing image gallery or canvas. Wearing a tiny lab coat to fit the 'lab' theme.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny white lab coat, examining a glowing digital canvas showing a beautiful landscape. A chunky retro computer monitor nearby displays an image gallery. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley, emotionally warm and nostalgic.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny white lab coat, examining a glowing digital canvas showing a beautiful landscape.
